name: Cruel King — Block Tales
description:
Tis The Season To Be Jolly!

It’s the Christmas time, and you know what that means...., A CHRISTMAS BALL IN BLACKROCK CASTLE!! Cruel King enjoys Christmas, even when his kingdom always snows, and has a soft spot for it. So he throws a party in his ball room, where there’s treats and food for Christmas, and his ball room is decorated for the occasion, while everyone is dressed and happy.

Art not by me! Hope you enjoy! Cruel King is my favorite, plus me and my friend played Block Tales a few days ago! Merry Early Christmas! ❤️❤️❤️
creator: Midnight-lol-WH@T
